title: Progress State
description: Schema for .state/_progress.json — per-concept and per-workflow learning state. Never edit manually; written by the tutor.

concepts.description: Map of concept_id → progress entry. Keys are snake_case concept IDs matching _plan.json and concepts_dir folder names.

started_at.description: ISO date when the concept was first taught, null if not yet started

completed_at.description: ISO date when the learner confirmed understanding, null otherwise

last_reviewed.description: ISO date of the most recent spaced-repetition review, null if never reviewed after completion

review_due.description: ISO date when the next review is due; null until the concept is Done, then set to completed_at + 7 days by default

workflows.description: Map of workflow_id → walkthrough state. Keys are snake_case workflow IDs matching workflows_dir file names.

last_walked.description: ISO date of the most recent walkthrough, null if never walked

steps_completed.description: Number of steps completed in the most recent walkthrough
